parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_vars WHERE key='admin_api_token' LIMIT 1;

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings) AS bookings_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE source='realtycalendar-ical') AS rc_bookings_count, (SELECT MAX(updated_at) FROM bookings WHERE source='realtycalendar-ical') AS latest_rc_sync, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_templates) AS templates_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE guest_chat_id IS NOT NULL) AS guest_connected_count;

SELECT id, apartment_id, apartment_name, checkin_at::text, checkout_at::text, nights, source, status, COALESCE(guest_name,'') AS guest_name, COALESCE(guest_username,'') AS guest_username, (guest_chat_id IS NOT NULL) AS guest_connected, journey_sent, 'https://t.me/GuestGelen_bot?start='||id AS deep_link, updated_at FROM bookings ORDER BY checkin_at ASC, apartment_id ASC;
SELECT key, channel, lang, body, active, updated_at FROM message_templates ORDER BY channel, key;

parameters.query:
WITH gap_data AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_gaps,
    COALESCE(SUM(estimated_loss), 0) AS total_estimated_loss,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE nights = 1) AS one_night_gaps,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE nights = 2) AS two_night_gaps,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE nights = 3) AS three_night_gaps
  FROM gap_windows
  WHERE status = 'open'
),
comp_prices AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS competitor_count,
    MIN(price_per_night) AS market_min,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY price_per_night) AS market_median,
    AVG(price_per_night) AS market_avg,
    MAX(price_per_night) AS market_max
  FROM competitor_prices
  WHERE date_from <= NOW() AND date_to >= NOW()
),
comp_sources AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS competitor_sources_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_competitors_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'excluded') AS excluded_competitors_count,
    MIN(cpo.price_per_night) FILTER (WHERE cs.status='active' AND cs.similarity_score>=80) AS cs_market_min,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cpo.price_per_night) FILTER (WHERE cs.status='active' AND cs.similarity_score>=80) AS cs_market_median,
    AVG(cpo.price_per_night) FILTER (WHERE cs.status='active' AND cs.similarity_score>=80) AS cs_market_avg,
    MAX(cpo.price_per_night) FILTER (WHERE cs.status='active' AND cs.similarity_score>=80) AS cs_market_max
  FROM competitor_sources cs
  LEFT JOIN competitor_price_observations cpo ON cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id
),
rec_data AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS recommendations_count
  FROM pricing_recommendations
  WHERE status IN ('draft', 'approved')
),
gap_json AS (
  SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(g)) AS gap_windows
  FROM (
    SELECT apartment_id, gap_start, gap_end, nights, estimated_loss, recommendation, status
    FROM gap_windows WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY gap_start, apartment_id
  ) g
),
cp_json AS (
  SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(c)) AS competitor_prices
  FROM (
    SELECT source, title, url, location, date_from, date_to, price_per_night, notes
    FROM competitor_prices ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 20
  ) c
),
obs_json AS (
  SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(o)) AS latest_observations
  FROM (
    SELECT cs.name AS competitor_name, cs.similarity_score,
           cpo.stay_date_from, cpo.stay_date_to, cpo.price_per_night,
           cpo.confidence, cpo.collection_method, cpo.observed_at
    FROM competitor_price_observations cpo
    JOIN competitor_sources cs ON cs.id = cpo.competitor_source_id
    ORDER BY cpo.observed_at DESC LIMIT 10
  ) o
)
SELECT
  gd.total_gaps, gd.total_estimated_loss,
  gd.one_night_gaps, gd.two_night_gaps, gd.three_night_gaps,
  cp.competitor_count, cp.market_min, cp.market_median, cp.market_avg, cp.market_max,
  cs2.competitor_sources_count, cs2.active_competitors_count, cs2.excluded_competitors_count,
  cs2.cs_market_min, cs2.cs_market_median, cs2.cs_market_avg, cs2.cs_market_max,
  rd.recommendations_count,
  gj.gap_windows, cpj.competitor_prices, oj.latest_observations
FROM gap_data gd, comp_prices cp, comp_sources cs2, rec_data rd,
     gap_json gj, cp_json cpj, obs_json oj

parameters.jsCode:
const j = ($('Webhook').first().json.body) || $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: {
  cp_source:        String(j.source        || ''),
  cp_title:         String(j.title         || ''),
  cp_url:           String(j.url           || ''),
  cp_location:      String(j.location      || ''),
  cp_max_guests:    j.max_guests    ? String(Number(j.max_guests))    : '',
  cp_rooms:         j.rooms         ? String(Number(j.rooms))         : '',
  cp_date_from:     String(j.date_from     || ''),
  cp_date_to:       String(j.date_to       || ''),
  cp_price:         String(Number(j.price_per_night) || 0),
  cp_rating:        j.rating        ? String(Number(j.rating))        : '',
  cp_reviews_count: j.reviews_count ? String(Number(j.reviews_count)) : '',
  cp_notes:         String(j.notes         || '')
} }];

parameters.query:
SELECT pr.id::text AS id, apartment_id, a.name AS apartment_name,
       to_char(pr.date_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date_from,
       to_char(pr.date_to,'YYYY-MM-DD')   AS date_to,
       pr.nights, pr.current_price::float, pr.market_min::float,
       pr.market_median::float, pr.market_avg::float, pr.market_max::float,
       pr.recommended_price::float, pr.recommendation_type,
       pr.reason, pr.confidence::float, pr.source, pr.status,
       to_char(pr.created_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at
FROM pricing_recommendations pr
JOIN apartments a ON a.id = pr.apartment_id
WHERE pr.status IN ('draft','approved') AND pr.date_from >= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY pr.date_from, pr.apartment_id

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO competitor_prices
  (source, title, url, location, max_guests, rooms,
   date_from, date_to, price_per_night, rating, reviews_count, notes)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.cp_source }}',
  '{{ $json.cp_title }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_url }}',''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_location }}',''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_max_guests }}','')::integer,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_rooms }}','')::integer,
  '{{ $json.cp_date_from }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.cp_date_to }}'::date,
  {{ $json.cp_price }}::numeric,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_rating }}','')::numeric,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_reviews_count }}','')::integer,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_notes }}','')
) RETURNING id::text AS id, source, title, price_per_night::float

SELECT
  cs.id, cs.name, cs.source_platform, cs.url, cs.address, cs.district,
  cs.similarity_score, cs.priority, cs.status, cs.property_type,
  cs.area_m2, cs.max_guests, cs.rooms,
  cs.distance_to_beach_m, cs.distance_to_center_m,
  cs.has_private_entrance, cs.has_private_kitchen, cs.has_balcony_or_terrace,
  cs.amenities, cs.min_stay, cs.target_audience,
  cs.price_low, cs.price_high,
  cs.selection_reason, cs.exclusion_reason,
  cs.last_checked_at,
  cs.created_at, cs.updated_at,
  (SELECT MAX(cpo.observed_at) FROM competitor_price_observations cpo WHERE cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id) AS last_observed_at,
  (SELECT cpo.price_per_night FROM competitor_price_observations cpo WHERE cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id ORDER BY cpo.observed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_price
FROM competitor_sources cs
ORDER BY cs.status, cs.priority
{{ $json.obs_query }}

WITH active_obs AS (
  SELECT cpo.price_per_night, cs.similarity_score,
         cpo.observed_at,
         (NOW() - cpo.observed_at) > INTERVAL '14 days' AS is_stale
  FROM competitor_price_observations cpo
  JOIN competitor_sources cs ON cs.id = cpo.competitor_source_id
  WHERE cs.status = 'active' AND cs.similarity_score >= 80
),
fresh AS (SELECT * FROM active_obs WHERE NOT is_stale),
all_obs AS (SELECT * FROM active_obs)
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.id) FROM competitor_sources cs WHERE cs.status='active') AS active_sources,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.id) FROM competitor_sources cs WHERE cs.status='excluded') AS excluded_sources,
  (SELECT MIN(price_per_night) FROM all_obs) AS market_min,
  (SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY price_per_night) FROM all_obs) AS market_median,
  (SELECT AVG(price_per_night) FROM all_obs) AS market_avg,
  (SELECT MAX(price_per_night) FROM all_obs) AS market_max,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM all_obs) AS total_observations,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fresh) AS fresh_observations_14d,
  (SELECT MAX(observed_at) FROM all_obs) AS latest_observed_at,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(cs)) FROM (
    SELECT cs.name, cs.similarity_score, cs.status, cs.price_low, cs.price_high,
           (SELECT cpo.price_per_night FROM competitor_price_observations cpo WHERE cpo.competitor_source_id=cs.id ORDER BY cpo.observed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_price,
           (SELECT MAX(cpo.observed_at) FROM competitor_price_observations cpo WHERE cpo.competitor_source_id=cs.id) AS last_observed
    FROM competitor_sources cs WHERE cs.status='active' ORDER BY cs.priority
  ) cs) AS competitor_details

INSERT INTO competitor_price_observations
  (competitor_source_id, stay_date_from, stay_date_to, nights, price_per_night,
   confidence, collection_method, notes)
VALUES
  ('{{ $json.q_id }}', '{{ $json.q_from }}', '{{ $json.q_to }}', {{ $json.q_nights }},
   {{ $json.q_price }}, {{ $json.q_confidence }}, 'manual_input', '{{ $json.q_notes }}');
UPDATE competitor_sources SET last_checked_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.q_id }}';

WITH old_rec AS (
  SELECT id, status, current_price, recommended_price, apartment_id,
         date_from, date_to
  FROM pricing_recommendations
  WHERE id = '{{ $json.q_rec_id }}'
),
upd AS (
  UPDATE pricing_recommendations
  SET status = 'approved', updated_at = now()
  WHERE id = '{{ $json.q_rec_id }}' AND status IN ('draft', 'rejected')
  RETURNING id, apartment_id, date_from, date_to, current_price, recommended_price
),
audit_ins AS (
  INSERT INTO pricing_action_audit_log
    (recommendation_id, action, previous_status, new_status,
     apartment_id, date_from, date_to, old_price, new_price,
     reason, actor, source)
  SELECT upd.id, 'approve', old_rec.status, 'approved',
         upd.apartment_id, upd.date_from, upd.date_to,
         upd.current_price, upd.recommended_price,
         '{{ $json.q_reason }}', 'admin', 'admin_panel'
  FROM upd, old_rec
  WHERE (SELECT count(*) FROM upd) > 0
  RETURNING id AS audit_id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM upd)::integer AS rows_updated,
  (SELECT id FROM upd LIMIT 1)::text AS rec_id,
  (SELECT audit_id FROM audit_ins LIMIT 1)::text AS audit_id,
  (SELECT status FROM old_rec LIMIT 1) AS previous_status

WITH old_rec AS (
  SELECT id, status, current_price, recommended_price, apartment_id,
         date_from, date_to
  FROM pricing_recommendations
  WHERE id = '{{ $json.q_rec_id }}'
),
upd AS (
  UPDATE pricing_recommendations
  SET status = 'rejected', updated_at = now()
  WHERE id = '{{ $json.q_rec_id }}' AND status IN ('draft', 'approved')
  RETURNING id, apartment_id, date_from, date_to, current_price, recommended_price
),
audit_ins AS (
  INSERT INTO pricing_action_audit_log
    (recommendation_id, action, previous_status, new_status,
     apartment_id, date_from, date_to, old_price, new_price,
     reason, actor, source)
  SELECT upd.id, 'reject', old_rec.status, 'rejected',
         upd.apartment_id, upd.date_from, upd.date_to,
         upd.current_price, upd.recommended_price,
         '{{ $json.q_reason }}', 'admin', 'admin_panel'
  FROM upd, old_rec
  WHERE (SELECT count(*) FROM upd) > 0
  RETURNING id AS audit_id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM upd)::integer AS rows_updated,
  (SELECT id FROM upd LIMIT 1)::text AS rec_id,
  (SELECT audit_id FROM audit_ins LIMIT 1)::text AS audit_id,
  (SELECT status FROM old_rec LIMIT 1) AS previous_status

SELECT
  COALESCE(
    json_agg(
      json_build_object(
        'id', al.id::text,
        'recommendation_id', al.recommendation_id::text,
        'action', al.action,
        'previous_status', al.previous_status,
        'new_status', al.new_status,
        'apartment_id', al.apartment_id,
        'date_from', to_char(al.date_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        'date_to', to_char(al.date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        'old_price', al.old_price::float,
        'new_price', al.new_price::float,
        'reason', al.reason,
        'actor', al.actor,
        'source', al.source,
        'created_at', to_char(al.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"')
      )
      ORDER BY al.created_at DESC
    ),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS audit_data,
  COUNT(*)::integer AS total
FROM (
  SELECT * FROM pricing_action_audit_log
  ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50
) al

SELECT
  to_char(observed_at::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS obs_date,
  COUNT(*)::integer AS count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (NOW()-observed_at) <= INTERVAL '14 days')::integer AS fresh_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (NOW()-observed_at) > INTERVAL '14 days')::integer AS stale_count,
  MIN(price_per_night)::float     AS min_price,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY price_per_night)::float AS median_price,
  ROUND(AVG(price_per_night))::float  AS avg_price,
  MAX(price_per_night)::float     AS max_price
FROM competitor_price_observations
WHERE price_per_night IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY observed_at::date
ORDER BY observed_at::date DESC
LIMIT 30
={{ $json.obs_sql }}

SELECT rec_id, apartment_id, date_from, date_to, nights,
  recommended_price, status, apartment_name, lot_id
FROM (
  SELECT pr.id::text AS rec_id, pr.apartment_id,
    to_char(pr.date_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date_from,
    to_char(pr.date_to,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date_to,
    pr.nights, pr.recommended_price::float AS recommended_price, pr.status,
    a.name AS apartment_name, a.lot_id::text AS lot_id
  FROM pricing_recommendations pr
  JOIN apartments a ON a.id::text = pr.apartment_id
  WHERE pr.id = '{{ $json.rec_id }}'::uuid AND pr.status = 'approved'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,'_not_found',NULL,NULL
) q
LIMIT 1

WITH rec_status AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'draft') AS draft_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'approved') AS approved_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'exported') AS exported_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'manually_applied') AS manually_applied_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'apply_failed') AS apply_failed_count
  FROM pricing_recommendations
),
gap_summary AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_gaps,
    COALESCE(SUM(estimated_loss), 0) AS total_estimated_loss
  FROM gap_windows
  WHERE status = 'open'
),
comp_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cs.status = 'active') AS active_competitors,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cpo.id) FILTER (
      WHERE cs.status = 'active'
        AND cpo.observed_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
    ) AS stale_obs,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cpo.id) FILTER (
      WHERE cs.status = 'active'
        AND cpo.observed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
    ) AS fresh_obs,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cpo.price_per_night)
      FILTER (WHERE cs.status = 'active' AND cs.similarity_score >= 80) AS market_median
  FROM competitor_sources cs
  LEFT JOIN competitor_price_observations cpo ON cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id
),
top_gaps AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(g) ORDER BY (g.estimated_loss) DESC NULLS LAST), '[]'::json) AS data
  FROM (
    SELECT apartment_id, gap_start, gap_end, nights,
           COALESCE(estimated_loss, 0) AS estimated_loss, recommendation
    FROM gap_windows
    WHERE status = 'open'
    ORDER BY estimated_loss DESC NULLS LAST
    LIMIT 3
  ) g
),
top_recs AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(r)), '[]'::json) AS data
  FROM (
    SELECT id, apartment_id, date_from, date_to, nights,
           recommended_price, current_price, market_median,
           recommendation_type, reason, status, confidence
    FROM pricing_recommendations
    WHERE status IN ('draft', 'approved', 'exported', 'apply_failed')
    ORDER BY
      CASE status
        WHEN 'apply_failed' THEN 1
        WHEN 'exported' THEN 2
        WHEN 'approved' THEN 3
        WHEN 'draft' THEN 4
        ELSE 5
      END,
      created_at DESC
    LIMIT 5
  ) r
),
latest_audit AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(a)), '[]'::json) AS data
  FROM (
    SELECT id, action, previous_status, new_status,
           apartment_id, date_from, date_to, old_price, new_price,
           reason, actor, created_at
    FROM pricing_action_audit_log
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
    LIMIT 5
  ) a
)
SELECT
  rs.draft_count, rs.approved_count, rs.exported_count,
  rs.manually_applied_count, rs.apply_failed_count,
  gs.total_gaps, gs.total_estimated_loss,
  cs.active_competitors, cs.stale_obs, cs.fresh_obs, cs.market_median,
  tg.data AS top_gaps,
  tr.data AS top_recs,
  la.data AS latest_audit
FROM rec_status rs, gap_summary gs, comp_stats cs,
     top_gaps tg, top_recs tr, latest_audit la

WITH
notif_wf AS (
  SELECT id, name, active,
         "versionId", "activeVersionId"
  FROM workflow_entity WHERE id = '14'
),
anti_spam AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'revenue_notification_last_sent_at' THEN value END) AS last_sent_at,
    MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'revenue_notification_last_hash' THEN value END) AS last_hash
  FROM system_vars
  WHERE key IN ('revenue_notification_last_sent_at', 'revenue_notification_last_hash')
),
dash AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='draft')        AS draft_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='approved')     AS approved_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='exported')     AS exported_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='apply_failed') AS apply_failed_count
  FROM pricing_recommendations
),
gap_s AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_gaps,
         COALESCE(SUM(estimated_loss),0) AS total_loss
  FROM gap_windows WHERE status='open'
),
last_exec AS (
  SELECT status,
         to_char("startedAt" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"') AS started_at,
         to_char("stoppedAt" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"') AS stopped_at
  FROM execution_entity
  WHERE "workflowId" = '14'
  ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  nw.id AS wf_id,
  nw.name AS wf_name,
  nw.active AS wf_active,
  sp.last_sent_at,
  sp.last_hash,
  CASE
    WHEN sp.last_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND sp.last_sent_at != ''
    THEN (NOW() - (sp.last_sent_at)::timestamptz) < INTERVAL '24 hours'
    ELSE false
  END AS within_24h,
  CASE
    WHEN sp.last_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND sp.last_sent_at != ''
    THEN to_char(((sp.last_sent_at)::timestamptz + INTERVAL '24 hours') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"')
    ELSE NULL
  END AS next_allowed_at,
  (d.draft_count + d.approved_count + d.exported_count + d.apply_failed_count) AS today_actions_count,
  d.apply_failed_count AS high_count,
  (d.draft_count + d.approved_count) AS medium_count,
  g.total_gaps,
  g.total_loss,
  le.status AS exec_status,
  le.started_at AS exec_started_at,
  le.stopped_at AS exec_stopped_at
FROM notif_wf nw
CROSS JOIN anti_spam sp
CROSS JOIN dash d
CROSS JOIN gap_s g
LEFT JOIN last_exec le ON TRUE

SELECT
  cc.code,
  cc.name,
  cc.target_apartment_ids,
  cc.min_guests,
  cc.max_guests,
  cc.min_area_m2,
  cc.max_area_m2,
  cc.property_types,
  cc.price_min,
  cc.price_max,
  cc.is_active,
  COALESCE(src_stats.active_count, 0) AS active_sources,
  COALESCE(obs_stats.obs_count, 0)    AS observations_count,
  obs_stats.latest_obs,
  obs_stats.market_median
FROM competitor_cohorts cc
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT cohort_code, COUNT(*) AS active_count
  FROM competitor_sources
  WHERE status IN ('active','approved') AND discovery_status IN ('seeded','approved')
  GROUP BY cohort_code
) src_stats ON src_stats.cohort_code = cc.code
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT cs.cohort_code,
         COUNT(cpo.id) AS obs_count,
         MAX(cpo.observed_at) AS latest_obs,
         PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cpo.price_per_night) AS market_median
  FROM competitor_sources cs
  JOIN competitor_price_observations cpo ON cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id
  WHERE cs.status IN ('active','approved')
  GROUP BY cs.cohort_code
) obs_stats ON obs_stats.cohort_code = cc.code
ORDER BY cc.is_active DESC, cc.code

SELECT
  cs.id,
  cs.name,
  cs.url,
  cs.source_platform,
  cs.cohort_code,
  cs.target_apartment_ids,
  cs.similarity_score,
  cs.signal_quality_score,
  cs.discovery_status,
  cs.status,
  cs.data_quality_notes,
  cs.selection_reason,
  cs.created_at
FROM competitor_sources cs
WHERE cs.discovery_status IN ('candidate','needs_review')
ORDER BY cs.created_at DESC

UPDATE competitor_sources
SET status = 'approved',
    discovery_status = 'approved',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.source_id }}'
  AND discovery_status IN ('candidate','needs_review')
RETURNING id, name, status, discovery_status

UPDATE competitor_sources
SET status = 'excluded',
    discovery_status = 'rejected',
    exclusion_reason = '{{ $json.reason }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.source_id }}'
  AND discovery_status IN ('candidate','needs_review')
RETURNING id, name, status, discovery_status

WITH cohort_data AS (
  SELECT
    cc.code AS cohort_code,
    cc.name AS cohort_name,
    cc.target_apartment_ids,
    COALESCE(s.active_count, 0) AS active_count,
    COALESCE(o.fresh_count, 0)  AS fresh_obs,
    COALESCE(o.total_obs, 0)    AS total_obs,
    o.market_median,
    o.market_min,
    o.market_max,
    o.latest_obs,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(s.active_count, 0) >= 5 AND COALESCE(o.fresh_count, 0) >= 3 THEN 'high'
      WHEN COALESCE(s.active_count, 0) >= 3 AND COALESCE(o.fresh_count, 0) >= 1 THEN 'medium'
      ELSE 'low'
    END AS data_quality
  FROM competitor_cohorts cc
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT cohort_code, COUNT(*) AS active_count
    FROM competitor_sources
    WHERE status IN ('active','approved') AND discovery_status IN ('seeded','approved')
    GROUP BY cohort_code
  ) s ON s.cohort_code = cc.code
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT cs.cohort_code,
           COUNT(cpo.id) AS total_obs,
           COUNT(cpo.id) FILTER (WHERE (NOW() - cpo.observed_at) <= INTERVAL '14 days') AS fresh_count,
           PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cpo.price_per_night) AS market_median,
           MIN(cpo.price_per_night) AS market_min,
           MAX(cpo.price_per_night) AS market_max,
           MAX(cpo.observed_at) AS latest_obs
    FROM competitor_sources cs
    JOIN competitor_price_observations cpo ON cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id
    WHERE cs.status IN ('active','approved')
    GROUP BY cs.cohort_code
  ) o ON o.cohort_code = cc.code
  WHERE cc.is_active = TRUE
),
apt_coverage AS (
  SELECT
    apt_id,
    cohort_code,
    active_count,
    fresh_obs,
    total_obs,
    market_median,
    data_quality,
    CASE
      WHEN cohort_code = 'large_family_house_territory' AND active_count < 3 THEN TRUE
      ELSE FALSE
    END AS needs_attention
  FROM cohort_data, unnest(target_apartment_ids) AS apt_id
  WHERE cohort_code != 'gelendzhik_background_market'
)
SELECT
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(cd)) FROM cohort_data cd) AS cohorts,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(ac)) FROM apt_coverage ac) AS apt_coverage,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM competitor_sources WHERE discovery_status IN ('candidate','needs_review')) AS candidates_pending,
  (SELECT bool_or(needs_attention) FROM apt_coverage) AS has_attention_needed,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('apt_id', apt_id, 'cohort', cohort_code, 'issue', 'insufficient_sources'))
   FROM apt_coverage WHERE needs_attention) AS attention_items
